title: Voting display
doc_html:
Rule 10.10.  Voting display

The actual numerical total of yea votes and nay votes shall be displayed to each member of the House of Representatives in the House Chamber immediately after the voting machine is closed.

HR 16, 2013, eff. June 24, 2013.

Rule 10.10.  Voting display
